paragraphs: Quant Developer at PIMCO working on systematic trading strategies. I enjoy building trading systems end-to-end, from research to live production.

Born and raised in South Africa, graduated from Georgia Tech in Atlanta, currently based in New York City. In my free time I enjoy playing soccer, chess, and reading. Feel free to message me on LinkedIn.

info.Education: BS Computer Engineering, Georgia Tech; CQF

education.title: BS in Computer Engineering
details: Concentrations: Information Internetworks, Distributed System & Software Design

skills.Systems: Operating Systems, Concurrency, Computer Architecture, Memory Hierarchy, Virtual Memory, Profiling, Performance Optimization
skills.Quant: Systematic Trading, Signal Implementation, Backtesting, Rates Derivatives

experience.title: Software Engineer (part-time)
experience.description: Led end-to-end development of an internal financial reporting web application using Django, MySQL, and AWS. Designed and implemented data pipelines integrating an Oracle data warehouse for automated financial reporting.

experience.title: Software Engineering Intern
experience.description: Developed 200+ production backend API endpoints in Python. Increased CI/CD test coverage to 100% by implementing automated tests across production services.
